title: DefenseClaw OTEL Resource
description: Resource attributes attached to all OTLP exports (logs, traces, metrics). Set once at sidecar startup.

service.name.description: Service name attached to every OTLP export. Defaults to 'defenseclaw' but can be overridden via OTEL_SERVICE_NAME or otel.resource.attributes for fleet identification (e.g. 'defenseclaw-prod-eu-west-1'). Operators MUST keep the value short and stable — downstream Splunk APM dashboards group by this attribute.

service.namespace.description: Service namespace for grouping in Splunk APM.

deployment.environment.description: Detected runtime environment. Recommended values are 'macos', 'dgx-spark', and 'linux' for the in-tree probes; operators with bespoke deployments can override via configuration (e.g. 'prod-us-east-1', 'staging'). Downstream dashboards must treat unknown values as opaque rather than enforce an allow-list.

defenseclaw.claw.mode.description: Active agent framework connector. Matches Connector.Name() in internal/gateway/connector. Empty string is permitted while no connector has been picked yet (fresh install before `defenseclaw setup connector`). Legacy values 'nemoclaw' and 'opencode' were never emitted by a released gateway; they were placeholders that became 'zeptoclaw' and 'claudecode' respectively, and have been dropped from the enum.

defenseclaw.claw.home_dir.description: Resolved home directory of the active claw framework. Path layout is connector-specific: openclaw uses ~/.openclaw, zeptoclaw uses ~/.zeptoclaw, claudecode uses ~/.claude (or $CLAUDE_HOME), codex uses ~/.codex, hermes uses ~/.hermes, cursor uses ~/.cursor, windsurf uses ~/.codeium/windsurf, geminicli uses ~/.gemini, and copilot uses ~/.copilot while workspace assets may live under .github/.

defenseclaw.device.id.description: Hex-encoded SHA-256 fingerprint of the DefenseClaw Ed25519 device public key. This is DefenseClaw pairing identity, not a host hardware UUID or generic endpoint identifier.

defenseclaw.instance.id.description: UUID generated at sidecar startup. Unique per process lifetime.
